section.heading: Reserve components: detail of members of regular and reserve components to assist

content.p: The Secretary concerned shall detail such members of the regular and reserve components under his jurisdiction as are necessary to effectively develop, train, instruct, and administer those reserve components.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 103–337, div. A, title XVI, § 1662(g)(1), Oct. 5, 1994, 108 Stat. 2995.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 715 of this title, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 103–337, § 1662(g)(2).

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Dec. 1, 1994, except as otherwise provided, see section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337, set out as a note under section 10001 of this title.
